value: {"action_id": "novel_send_test_tanker", "description": "Tanker operators dispatch a single test tanker through the strait with disguised cargo and a pre-arranged bribe to Iranian officials, while monitoring US naval patrol patterns.", "actor_ids": ["tanker_operators"], "authority_required": [], "targets": ["iranian_officials", "us_navy"], "effects": [{"kind": "send_message", "params": {"institution_id": "iranian_government", "options": [], "stage": "bribery", "key": "bribe_arrangement", "value": "test_tanker_passage"}}, {"kind": "set_state", "params": {"institution_id": "strait_monitoring", "options": [], "stage": "", "key": "test_tanker_dispatched", "value": "true"}}], "emits_events": [{"etype": "tanker_departure", "observers": ["public"]}], "writes_terminal": false, "validation": ""}
